  "active_set": ["R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Evaluate whether the argument chain—from data collection and labeling assumptions through model description, metrics, and conclusions about prevalence calibration—follows logically without assessing evidence strength.",
    "RX.1": "Flag where the logical assessment may be uncertain due to relying only on the provided excerpt and lacking methodological detail.",
    "RX.2": "Constrain judgments to internal logical relations and avoid inferring empirical validity or broader claims not entailed by the text.",
    "RX.3": "Adhere strictly to checking logical consistency and avoid engaging in rewriting, evidence-claim alignment, novelty, or stylistic edits.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid framing that could enable misuse (e.g., gaming detectors) or stigmatize worker populations when discussing logic.",
    "RX.5": "Reference only statements present in the provided artifact so the reasoning can be traced to specific passages."
  }
}

rationale.R1.2: Evaluate whether the argument chain—from data collection and labeling assumptions through model description, metrics, and conclusions about prevalence calibration—follows logically without assessing evidence strength.
rationale.RX.1: Flag where the logical assessment may be uncertain due to relying only on the provided excerpt and lacking methodological detail.
rationale.RX.2: Constrain judgments to internal logical relations and avoid inferring empirical validity or broader claims not entailed by the text.
rationale.RX.3: Adhere strictly to checking logical consistency and avoid engaging in rewriting, evidence-claim alignment, novelty, or stylistic edits.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid framing that could enable misuse (e.g., gaming detectors) or stigmatize worker populations when discussing logic.
rationale.RX.5: Reference only statements present in the provided artifact so the reasoning can be traced to specific passages.
